There was an event during 1.0 anniv, 1.5 anniv, 2.0 anniv, it was a raid event where you got multiple stages with bosses, each stages have limit of entry.

It was an event made for drama because each time they rerun it, it went worse than previous raid

- forced select assist unit + 1 time use assist
- 1 time use unit + wheel + posse
- rewards per stage were too good to pass on so it was FOMO
- each raid took like 10min if you were a newbie so basically 17 x 10min = 170min = 3 hours+ PER DAY
- stage entry limit, so people rushed on the stage with the most profitable rewards and ignored the rest, making the stage last only couple of hours after it opened and leaving people who had heavy schedule in shambles
